title: Frontier Board
description: Top-level array of frontier-model rows (content/frontier_board.json), spec sec-5 verbatim: [{lab, region, model, release_date, modality[], context_window?, access, significance, source_url, last_verified}]. Phase 1 ships this schema only -- seeding >=12 rows across US/China/open-weights is Phase 3.

modality.description: Free-form modality tags, e.g. 'text', 'image', 'audio', 'code'. Spec does not fix an enum here.

context_window.description: Context window in tokens, nullable when not publicly disclosed.

last_verified.description: Date this row was last fact-checked against its source_url. Frontend pulse-eligibility (last 7 days) is computed from this field.
